findings.evidence: `rg -n "\b(change|show|simpa|simp only|rw|revert|convert)\b"` reports `128:  show IsEffective D ↔ IsEffective D from Iff.rfl`.
findings.fix: Use a direct proof such as `Iff.rfl`/`rfl` if it works, or add a short comment explaining the necessary goal-shape coercion before the `show`.
findings.issue: `mem_effectiveSubmonoid` uses `show IsEffective D ↔ IsEffective D from Iff.rfl` without a comment explaining why the goal cannot be closed directly.

summary: One proof uses an undocumented `show`, which the proof-quality rubric treats as a sign of brittle definitional-goal manipulation. Replace it with a direct proof or document why the goal shape needs to be forced.
